title: Claude Fable 5 simulates the solar system and predicts a solar eclipse
summary: Claude Fable 5 built a solar system simulation by deriving planetary orbital motion from physics first principles and used it to predict solar eclipses. This demonstrates the model's reasoning and simulation capabilities.
writeup: The video shows Claude Fable 5 constructing a solar system simulation by deriving planetary orbital motion from physics first principles, then using that simulation to predict solar eclipses. It illustrates the model's ability to reason over a complex physical system rather than rely on prepackaged formulas. The takeaway: deriving orbital dynamics from foundational physics and chaining that into eclipse prediction stands as a concrete demonstration of rigorous reasoning applied to a multistep physical problem.
